name: Bank Saint-Petersburg Public Joint-Stock Company
summary: √Ç¬ìBank √Ç¬ìSaint-Petersburg√Ç¬î Public Joint-Stock Company, a universal bank, provides a range of banking products and services to individuals and corporates in Russia. The company's Corporate Banking division offers payment and settlement services, corporate loans, investment banking services, risk hedging solutions, and deposits. It also provides loans to small and medium enterprises comprising working capital, purchase equipment, vehicles, real estate, and other property finance; loans to agricultural enterprises; and a range of services related to documentary operations and international trade finance, as well as develops services for Exim companies. The company's Retail Banking division offers term deposits and current accounts; payments and transfers solutions; and mortgage, car, and consumer loans, as well as issues bank cards and provides related services. Its Private Banking division provides products and services to individuals, including concierge services related to traveling, creation of wine collections, real estate purchase, and art-banking. The company's Digital Banking division offers e-banking system for retail customers; and Internet banking services through i.bspb.ru, as well as mobile banking applications. The company operates 58 offices in Saint Petersburg; 1 branch and 1 office in Moscow; and 1 branch and 5 offices Kaliningrad, as well as the Leningrad region and Novosibirsk. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Saint Petersburg, Russia.
